race.description: Rockhampton Mini Loads Ken Russell Memorial Hcp
race.comment: The penny has dropped for NEVERENOUGHLEGO (2) who has strung together three wins on the bounce and is racing high on confidence since joining the new stable. Reunites with winning hoop Martyn and again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim. Can continue the rich vein of form. EVAREADYMISS (8) put back-to-back victories together to start the career before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and shouldn't be underestimated while fresh. THEE CREEK (1) has been plying his trade in harder southeast QLD races and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Watch for sharp improvement. BONEWOOD (11) returned in fine fashion with a dominant Mackay victory and will have come on with that win now under the belt. In the mix. I'M NELSON (5) rounds out the selections in what could turn out to be a solid form race.
